title: Scape and Run: Parasites Quark
description: Adds parasitic variants of quark entities.
body:
### An addon for the mods [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) and [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) that adds parasitic versions of Quark mobs.

![Hijacked Pirate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jT8j8tot/images/5516be81ffe820368bbf71e67af0430a28274838.png)
![Assimilated Archaeologist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jT8j8tot/images/9d680527195f2d0069ed9a7436707b1550b22e29.png)
![Assimilated Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jT8j8tot/images/c693fc6051df99574e3deebbf4f998585acb63db.png)

**New Parasites:**
- Assimilated Archaeologist
- Assimilated Crab
- Assimilated Dweller
- Assimilated Frog
- Assimilated Stoneling
- Hijacked Ashen
- Hijacked Pirate

**New Structures:**
- A ship with Hijacked Pirates.
- Several ships with Hijacked Pirates.

![Pirate Ships](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jT8j8tot/images/b231acb3bbd1e0d8d6ea604439dd48260af1ff24.png)

**Future Plans:**
- Adding unique sounds for entities.
- Introducing feral versions of the Crab and Frog.
- Implementing infected versions of Quark structures.

**The addon can be customized in the config.**

**Help/Support/Suggestions:**

### [Join the discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)
